summary.en: Alibaba's logistics platform — an asset-light coordination layer (vs SF Express's and JD Logistics's heavy fleets) that aggregates third-party couriers, layers a data-and-electronic-waybill standard on top, and adds owned key nodes only where leverage demands it (six EWTP global e-hubs, smart warehouses, neighbourhood Cainiao Stations). Filed for HKEX IPO in 2023, withdrew it in early 2024, and was re-folded into Alibaba Group later that year.
summary.zh: 阿里巴巴的物流平台 —— 轻资产协调层(对比顺丰、京东物流的重资产),聚合第三方快递,在上面叠加数据中台与电子运单标准,只在杠杆点上自建关键节点(EWTP 全球 6 大 e-hub、智能仓、社区菜鸟驿站)。2023 年向港交所递交招股书,2024 年初撤回,同年并回阿里集团。

sources.label: Cainiao Smart Logistics Network · HKEX IPO Prospectus (2023, withdrawn)
